name: veltara
description: Veltara — full-stack social platform with shared Three.js planet

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,workers,portal -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @veltara/web dev" "pnpm --filter @veltara/workers dev" "pnpm --filter @veltara/portal dev"
scripts.docker:clean:hard: docker compose down --volumes --remove-orphans --rmi all && docker system prune -f
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @veltara/shared build && pnpm --filter @veltara/sdk build && pnpm --filter @veltara/web build && pnpm --filter @veltara/portal build
